content: @content-collections/core with @content-collections/vite plugin integrates natively with TanStack Start (v1.121.0+). Process MDX/markdown at build time with Zod schema validation. TanStack Start quickstart documented at content-collections.dev. Define collections with defineCollection() and validate with Zod schemas. @content-collections/mdx handles MDX compilation. Content available server-side in loaders and server functions.
